name: TestWaitForByteInput
title: TestWaitForByteInput
syntax: long TestWaitForByteInput(char text[], char caption[], char info[]); // form 1
long TestWaitForByteInput(char text[], char caption[], char info[], dword timeout); // form 2
description: This function opens a dialog for byte array input. Optionally you can set some timeout in ms. Afterwards the dialog will be closed. You can optionally define some default input for the dialog.

parameters.name: Text
parameters.description: Text to be displayed in the entry dialog.

parameters.name: Timeout
parameters.description: Optional timeout for the dialog in ms.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
